message.content:
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor HCP

rectangle "Community A" as CommunityA {
  participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP
  participant "Aggregator" as Aggregator
  participant "CO-Registry" as CORegistry
  participant "CO-Repository" as CORepository
  participant "CO-IGW" as COIGW
}

rectangle "Community X" as CommunityX {
  participant "OC-RGW" as OCRGW
  participant "OC-Registry" as OCRegistry
  participant "OC-Repository" as OCRepository
}

HCP -> GFPP: [01] Get all immunization data
GFPP -> GFPP: [02] query all registries
GFPP -> COIGW: [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
CORegistry -> CORegistry: [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
CORegistry -> CORegistry: [05] Lookup Data
CORegistry -> COIGW: [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
COIGW -> COIGW: [07] request all communities
COIGW -> OCRGW: [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
OCRegistry -> OCRegistry: [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
OCRegistry -> OCRegistry: [10] Lookup Data
OCRegistry -> COIGW: [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
COIGW -> COIGW: [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
COIGW -> COIGW: [13] end loop
COIGW -> COIGW: [14] Assemble Query Responses
COIGW -> GFPP: [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
GFPP -> GFPP: [16] list of document info
GFPP -> GFPP: [17] retrieve all documents
GFPP -> CORegistry: [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
CORegistry -> CORegistry: [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
CORegistry -> CORegistry: [20] allocate document data
CORegistry -> GFPP: [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
COIGW -> OCRGW: [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
OCRepository -> OCRepository: [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
OCRepository -> OCRepository: [24] allocate document data
OCRepository -> COIGW: [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
COIGW -> COIGW: [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
COIGW -> COIGW: [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
COIGW -> GFPP: [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
GFPP -> Aggregator: [29] Aggregate documents
Aggregator -> Aggregator: [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document
Aggregator -> HCP: [31] Show immunization data

note right of HCP
  Version 1.0
end note

@enduml
